summary: Iteration 138 - Frontend testing for SMSF stability fixes, ErrorBoundary implementation, and consolidated unified pages. All 10 tests passed. SMSFOptimizer loads without crash (optional chaining fix verified), ErrorBoundary wraps all unified pages, all tab counts correct, Goals & Scenarios correctly removed from UnifiedClientOverview (4 tabs now).

minor.issue: 500 errors on crypto-related endpoints (cosmetic - UI handles gracefully)

issues: Console warnings about width/height -1 on initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after layout settles

critical_code_review_comments: ErrorBoundary.jsx correctly implements React error boundary with retry functionality and data-testid attributes
SMSFOptimizer.jsx uses optional chaining correctly: result?.contributions?.total_concessional, result?.projections, result?.tax_analysis, result?.caps, result?.recommendations

All unified pages (UnifiedInvestments, UnifiedTaxCentre, UnifiedComplianceCentre, UnifiedResearchCentre, UnifiedGoalsPlanning, UnifiedDashboard, UnifiedClientOverview) wrap TabsContent with ErrorBoundary
App.js has global ErrorBoundary wrapping Suspense/AppRouter
UnifiedClientOverview correctly has 4 tabs (Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Health Score) - Goals & Scenarios tab removed to avoid duplication
navData.js correctly includes Goals & Scenarios under Planning section in clientContextNav
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SMSF stability fixes verified working. ErrorBoundary implementation complete across all unified pages. Tab counts verified: UnifiedInvestments (9 tabs), UnifiedTaxCentre (8 tabs), UnifiedComplianceCentre (4 tabs), UnifiedResearchCentre (4 tabs), UnifiedGoalsPlanning (2 tabs), UnifiedDashboard (3 tabs), UnifiedClientOverview (4 tabs - Goals & Scenarios removed), AdvisorCommandCenter (3 tabs). Sidebar navigation correct for all modes.

smsf_optimizer_no_crash.details: SMSFOptimizer tab in /investments loads without crash - optional chaining fix working correctly

error_boundary_component.details: ErrorBoundary.jsx exists with retry functionality and data-testid='error-boundary-fallback' and 'error-boundary-retry'

unified_tax_centre_8_tabs.details: UnifiedTaxCentre at /tax-analysis-sync has all 8 tabs: Tax Analysis, Capital Gains, Tax Loss Harvesting, Tax Calendar, BAS Calculator, Income Splitting, Trust Distributions, Division 7A

unified_compliance_centre_4_tabs.details: UnifiedComplianceCentre at /adviceos has all 4 tabs: AdviceOS, Compliance Dashboard, Breach Register, Risk Controls

unified_research_centre_4_tabs.details: UnifiedResearchCentre at /stock-research has all 4 tabs: Stock Research, Broker Research, Investment Comparison, Property Comparison

unified_goals_planning_2_tabs.details: UnifiedGoalsPlanning at /scenario-modelling has all 2 tabs: Goals & Scenarios, Monte Carlo

unified_dashboard_3_tabs.details: UnifiedDashboard at /dashboard (Personal Mode) has all 3 tabs: Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends

unified_client_overview_4_tabs.details: UnifiedClientOverview at /dashboard (Adviser Mode with client) has 4 tabs: Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Health Score - Goals & Scenarios tab correctly REMOVED (deduplicated)

advisor_command_center_3_tabs.details: AdvisorCommandCenter at /advisor-command-center has all 3 tabs: Dashboard, Daily Briefing, Decision Centre

global_error_boundary.details: App.js has global ErrorBoundary wrapping Suspense/AppRouter

sidebar_navigation.details: Sidebar navigation correct for Personal Mode with Goals & Scenarios and Budget under Planning section

tab_switching_no_crashes.details: Switching between all tabs in UnifiedInvestments does not trigger ErrorBoundary fallback

mocked_apis_list: DEMO_CLIENT_DATA in App.js for 5 demo clients
